channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Signs and sandbags left behind, 2nd April
item.description:
The 'triangle' at the junction of School Road and Station Road was repaired three weeks ago. Signs and sandbags still litter the site.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, School Road, Bishop's Cleeve
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor

item.title: Tree is damaged problem, 2nd April
item.description:
diseased tree
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Promised tree replacement not taking place, 2nd April
item.description:
The pavement outside the side return of 1 Milton Road - a tree was removed prior to the current pavement resurfacing works starting. Residents were assured that all removed trees would be replaced, but no replacement tree pit has been installed by the contractors in this location.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 12, Milton Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

item.description:

item.title: Numerous Illegal fly boarding by estate agents, 1st April
item.description:
There are a number of estate agents boards displayed on the main Shurdington Road which appear to not be on the curtilage of the property being sold which is not allowed under planning law.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shurdington Road, Badgeworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Massive pot hole right on the bend, 1st April
item.description:
Please repair this correctly it’s very dangerous
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Pittville Circus, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Metal cover bangs constantly with traffic, 1st April
item.description:
The metal cover adjacent to the pedestrian crossing bangs every time a car passes, disturbing the residents on either side.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A435, Bishop's Cleeve
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street sign, hit by vehicle and name of street missing, 1st April
item.description:
Junction of Moorend Grove and Arden Road, Leckhampton Cheltenham. Street sign been missing for several weeks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 10, Moorend Grove, Leckhampton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: URGENT 40mph sign 30mph facing wrong way., 1st April
item.description:
Since the temp speed restrictions have been removed the 30mph/40mph speed gateway signs are facing the wrong way so heading to Racecourse roundabout states 40mph heading to Cleeve states 30mph. This is in urgent need of turning around as misleading and dangerous.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Evesham Road, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The 40mph sign just before GE Roundabout on GE side has nkw been put back into action after the removal of the temp 30mph due toccycle path but the sign is still covered in grey paint so can't see the speed limit what the sign is displaying., 1st April
item.description:
On right hand side of A435 next to GE heading towards the roundabout from the Evesham bypass.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A435, Bishop's Cleeve
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Sign plate is misaligned (Non illuminating sign)

item.title: Dead elm at the roadside needing taking down., 1st April
item.description:
Outside my house tynings farm, next to my front hedge. The tree could drop some branches. Gl51 4xf. I've just realised the tree is dead as the leaves are not coming out.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shurdington Road, Shurdington, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: These potholes are too big to describe, 1st April
item.description:
These potholes have been reported before , and the road now resembles a rumble strip approx 20 yards long . This section needs reparing correctly , not just a gang go out and throw some tarmac in a hole and say the repair has been done . This is a fast section of the road with vehicles overtaking slow ones to get up the incline , are any repairs actually inspected to see if they meet the required criteria for a competent repair .
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A40, Shipton, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A very large and unavoidable pothole on the A40, 1st April
item.description:
It’s not far from Shipton on the A40, my boyfriend was driving and swerved to miss a pothole and drove into the bigger pothole and it popped his tire.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A40, Shipton, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous potholes on the approach to the dual carriageway., 1st April
item.description:
On the 17th August 2023 my mother in law died and my wife and I drove to Oxfordshire using this section of the A40. The dangerous series of potholes on the approach to the dual carriageway were apparent then. Over the last two and a half years I have made numerous trips to my late mother in laws house as my wife had become her fathers carer. This section of road is still dangerous and especially so when driving at night or in the rain. This last week end I had to travel along this section of road again, and the surface is just as bad if not worse as it was in August 2023. In fact the degradation of the surface is so bad that the lady driving the Land Rover in front of me was almost forced to a halt, as the road surface was obviously affecting the steering of her vehicle. Some- body is liable to have a serious accident in the near future and I think that this section of a major truck road needs urgent attention.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A40, Shipton, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two tonne bags full of rubbish fly tipped near animal shelter, 1st April
item.description:
Opposite animal shelter main entrance to side of pedestrian only path

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gardners Lane, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Across most of the road, 1st April
item.description:
Across most of the Old Bath road heading north immediately after the mini roundabout. Nery dangerous for cyclists!!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Old Bath Road, Fairview, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
